idea.name: smart-postgres-performance-tuner
idea.description: Real-time PostgreSQL performance analyzer that monitors query execution, connection pools, cache hit ratios, and table bloat. Provides autonomous tuning by adjusting configuration parameters like shared_buffers, work_mem, and maintenance_work_mem based on observed workload patterns.

documentation: Analisa performance do PostgreSQL em tempo real — queries lentas, conexões, locks, cache hit ratio. Gera recomendações de otimização para o ch8_cluster.
